method_note: Codex CLI was installed but Grep-tool was used directly because the work is mechanical (12 terms x grep + classify) and Grep parallelizes via single message of tool calls. Each term grep'd across services/ apps/ contracts/ tools/ (skipping node_modules/.venv/.git/dist/build/__pycache__/target). Content samples taken from representative source files to disambiguate meaning per file. Per-term match samples capped (Grep head_limit) per spec.

meanings.meaning: Optogon path-runtime session — SQLite-backed `OptogonSessionState` row identifying a particular traversal of a Path through nodes (session_id, path_id, state_json, node_states)
canvas-engine clone-session — Vite sandbox instance keyed by `sessionId`, holds an in-process Vite dev server per generated clone
Claude Code conversation session — `session_id` of a Claude Code (CLI) conversation, indexed for triage / cross-session retrospectives
Cognitive-sensor triage-server `session: live` marker — UI tag identifying a single live ingestion run of triage_server.py
Optogon Cortex-side triage session — a remote async reasoning session started by Cortex via POST /session/start; this is the Cortex-client view of #1
AbortController.signal `signal` (DOM) — wired through `fetch({ signal: controller.signal })` for cancellable HTTP; also appears as `session`-shaped scope on canvas/inpact API helpers

Atlas Signal.v1 (governance signal) — JSON-Schema-validated event ring buffer in delta-kernel; types: `status|completion|blocked|approval_required|error|insight`. Canonical Optogon -> Cortex -> InPACT plumbing.
AbortController.signal (DOM/Node fetch cancellation token)
Triangulation consensus `signal` — a DOM/spatial/visual voter that returns a score that gets quorum-weighted
Auto-label heatmap prominence `signal` — visual-prominence ranking signal computed from fontSize x WCAG contrast, used as a ranking input for hotspot labels
Cognitive-sensor agent_classifier — `done|started|stalled` keyword indicators mined from text
Mosaic-orchestrator compound-loop `signal` — skill/finance/network health metric delta written into a metrics JSON
Optogon-emitted feedback / profile preference signal — `signal_type` field in seed_preferences.py-style records consumed by the preference store
Optogon tier-tagged inference context — `dict[Tier, dict[str, Any]]` with tiers `confirmed|user|inferred|system`; resolved by precedence
ContextPackage.v1 contract — JSON-schema'd `package` envelope built by sitepull_adapter (`build_context_package(anatomy_path) -> ContextPackage`)
Directive `context_bundle` field — payload section inside a Directive.v1 that ghost_executor reads when composing a TaskPrompt
CloseSignal `context_residue` — preferences gleaned from a closed loop, fed to delta-kernel preferences-store
delta-kernel HTTP `/api/atlas/bridge` `context` body field — free-form `{action, context}` carrying task_title / draft_data for executor-bridge
AI assistant prompt `context` — InPACT's clipboard-pasted Claude-prompt snapshot (`ai-context.js` builds it from current screen state)
Lovable system-prompt 'context' (vendored) — the LLM-prompt conversation-history concept (`you have access to the full conversation context`)
UASC interpreter execution trace — list of state-machine node names visited during a UASC program run
Cortex task-history trace — log of last 20 executor runs with full step-by-step trace
Atlas CLI lifecycle trace — `atl lifecycle <id>` state-machine trace for a thread
canvas-engine pattern-library 'trace logs' — debug log slug embedded in each Pattern (`Unique slug used in trace logs`)
Plotly.js chart-data 'trace' (the visualization JS library's native object) — series rendered on Atlas Explorer maps
Atlas governance Mode — 6-state enum `RECOVER|CLOSURE|MAINTENANCE|BUILD|COMPOUND|SCALE` carried in delta-kernel state and rendered by every governance UI
auth/runtime mode flag — 'running without auth (dev mode)' and similar `dev mode` / `production mode` runtime switches in delta-kernel server
Lattice frontend ctx-mode — UI view toggle (`tree|graph|timeline`) persisted in localStorage as `lattice.ctxMode`
Atlas-galaxy template mode-toggle — `analytics | graph` panel switcher in the static atlas_template.html
Plotly scattergl trace `mode` — chart point/line drawing mode (`markers`); native library param, not Atlas-domain
image-edit canvas blend `mode` / shader mode — pixel-edit shader mode in canvas-engine image-edit
Atlas Directive.v1 contract — schema-validated `{id, task, context_bundle, execution}` emitted by directive.ts and consumed by cortex ghost_executor
Cognitive-sensor directive_engine output — confrontational hard-truth statement generated from cognitive_state.json (NOT the Directive.v1 contract; a human-facing 'directive' string)
CycleBoard daily_directive — front-end struct `{daily_directive, mode_escalation, primary_order}` rendered as the strategic-directive banner in CycleBoard
InPACT-side `primary_order` rendered as 'Atlas directive: ...' in AI-context markdown
Mosaic compound-loops risk/analyst engine 'directive' — recommendation string produced by the deterministic risk engines
ContextPackage.v1 — Optogon's anatomy-derived schema-bound 'package' envelope (the verb is `build_context_package`)
npm/Python package metadata — `package.json` / installed Python package (Perception 'Paths anchored to the installed package, not cwd')
Project sentinel marker — `package.json` / `pyproject.toml` used as a project-root sentinel in cognitive-sensor cluster mapper
Lovable system-prompt 'package' guidance — the LLM prompt mentions managing packages in the React project (vendored)
BEHAVIORAL_AUDIT and design narrative — 'package' used as a unit-of-shipping noun in human prose
anatomy-frame-sidecar bundle.frame — PNG screenshot frame passed from anatomy-extension to the (now-removed) sidecar for carbo-shrink (concept survives in extension docs)
HTML/CSS iframe element — `iframe` backdrop in the anatomy-map for live-vendored backdrops
Remotion video animation frame — `useCurrentFrame()` per-frame interpolation in canvas-demo's Remotion compositions
Optogon Codex delegate 'fresh-frame' framing — informal noun in agent guidance ('fresh-frame second opinion')
Triangulation spatial element type — `'frame'` as a generic spatial container in spatial tests
Camera stream simulated frame — `SimulatedFrame` type in delta-kernel deferred camera adapter (image-buffer per tick)
canvas-engine — the URL-to-clone TS/Express service on port 3050
delta-kernel — TypeScript deterministic state engine on port 3001 (referred to as 'delta-kernel' rather than '*-engine', but functions as the kernel engine; tracked separately under term 'kernel')
Aegis PolicyEngine — multi-tenant policy condition evaluator (`new PolicyEngine(...)`)
Optogon path-runtime engine — Cortex's optogon_client docstring calls Optogon '(path-runtime engine, :3010)'
MiroFish prediction engine — package-level docstring, FastAPI service identity, insight_engine.py orchestrator
Cognitive-sensor directive_engine — Python module producing confrontational directives
Mosaic compound-loops risk_engine / analyst_engine — pure-function risk-mitigation engines
Cognitive-sensor ghost_executor / fabric-tests 'prep engine' — narrative term for the draft-generation pipeline (`Prep engine generated N drafts`)
Perception prediction engine — Step-6 anchor + prediction engine that emits inferred elements
delta-kernel — the deterministic state-fabric service (`services/delta-kernel/`, port 3001). Universal across the codebase; nearly all `kernel` matches are this path reference.
Original 'Delta-State Fabric v0' kernel concept — historical doctrine name preserved in PRE_ATLAS_MAP.md ('Delta-State Fabric v0')
delta-kernel SystemState — authoritative `{ mode, risk, openLoops, ... }` system_state entity stored via storage.loadEntitiesByType / saveEntity
cognitive_state.json — separately-stored cognitive-sensor snapshot merged into the unified state
OptogonSessionState — per-session JSON state (node_states, action_results) persisted in optogon SQLite
CycleBoard frontend state — JS state object with AZTask, DayPlans, undo/redo history
lattice_status / draft state — generic 'state' field on entity records (cortex_metadata, draft state, project state)
UASC interpreter state — `node_trace`-bearing per-run state in research/uasc-m2m reference implementation
Festival reconciliation state — `state` field in fest-reconcile cluster matrices (ship_flow, era_matrix)
anatomy-extension — Chrome MV3 extension v0.4.4 (alt+click labels, auto-scan, 'pull this page')

anatomy-frame-sidecar — historical Node service (port 3051) that received PNGs from the extension and returned cell grids; no source files present in current tree, concept survives only in extension content.js docs and audit memory
anatomy-rewrite (Plan D specs) — implementation migrated into anatomy-extension/lib/; folder is historical scaffolding (no source files in current tree; referenced in cognitive-sensor fuzz docs)
anatomy-research — vendored OSS reference repos (gitignored). Not first-party; mentioned only in audit/build configs.
AnatomyV1 schema — `contracts/schemas/AnatomyV1.v1.json` (draft-07) + Zod twin at `services/canvas-engine/src/adapter/v1-schema.ts`
anatomy-v1 envelope — runtime JSON shape built by `buildAnatomyV1()` in extension content.js; conforms to the schema (#5)
anatomy-pull-v1 envelope — sibling envelope `{version: 'anatomy-pull-v1', html, stylesheets, assets, anatomy?}` from extension's 'pull this page'
Perception scanner adapter to anatomy — drives anatomy-extension via Playwright and translates the envelope into Element schema
/anatomy-map skill / anatomy/today.html — slash command + skill-rendered today-anatomy-map HTML produced by `anatomy/_build_today.py`

method_validation.note: anatomy produced exactly 9 distinct meanings matching reference_anatomy_disambiguation.md. The same 9 surfaces (extension, sidecar, rewrite, research, schema, v1 envelope, pull-v1 envelope, web-audit/perception scanner adapter, /anatomy-map skill) appear; the 'web-audit anatomy' surface from the reference lives outside Pre Atlas (in C:/Users/bruke/web-audit/), so its first-party Pre Atlas analogue (the perception/scanner_adapter.py that consumes anatomy-extension envelopes) was used in slot #8.
